generated_comment: Arre yaar, ab tu bhi philosophy shuru kar dega? These are just words we grew up with. Kaun seriously apni maa behen ko gaali de raha hai? Itna overthink mat kar.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment encodes the 'it's just a word' defense, normalising the use of gaalis that are structurally rooted in female-demeaning abuse. It dismisses any suggestion that such language carries misogynistic intent or impact, aligning with the surface manifestation of defending gaali use as 'just expression, not actually about women'.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
